title: The Crew Sails for Alabasta
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on the crew sails for alabasta, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: The Crew Sails for Alabasta. Kureha fires Hiriluk’s final miracle into the snow, sending Chopper off beneath cherry blossoms and a new flag. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: This is Nooooo JOOOKE!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: I'm an Okama! One who follows the "path of the Okama!"

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: Who do you silly billies think I am!?

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: BAROGUE WORKS (Officer Agent) MR. 2 BON KUREI

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Repeat to me what Mr. O's orders were!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Terminate Mr. 3 who's travelling somewhere between Alabasta and little garden...

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yes indeed10!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: And that's exactly why I came to this island straight from Alabasta.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ughhh...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: But now what!? We've already reached little garden and not once during our voyage did we spot Mr. 3!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: T-That's...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: You sure it's not you bumbling fools who accidentally missed his ship!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: N-NO... I'm sure...

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: What was that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: If you're sure of it, then how do you explain our current situation!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: doesn't that make me the silly Billy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Mr. Silly Billy or Ms. Silly Billy? Which do you prefer!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: UMM... M-MISTER!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shut your trap!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I can't fail some trivial mission like hunting down Mr. 3 during a most critical time like now!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 1
dialogue.text: Failure is unforgivable! If I fail here, Mr. 1 and his partner's sure to come hunt me down! It's noooooo Joooooke!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hiya!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: IF YOU DON'T WANT TO BECOME A PRACTICE DUMMY FOR MY OKAMA KEMPO,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You'll find Mr. 3 no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Have Swanda Express Head Back to Alabasta at Full Speed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: And don't you dare miss spotting even the tiniest rowboat!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 2 Bon Clay
dialogue.text: Yes sir, Mr. 2 Bon Kurei!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hmm?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Another pirate raid?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Do they not realize I'm here in this kingdom...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: who knows... but a country in turmoil is an ideal prey for pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Will you go...?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Of course. I have to keep up with surface appearances, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: A "Royal Shibhibukai" is a pirate that hunts other pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Ace
dialogue.text: a Savior of the people.

summary: This part highlights the crew sails for alabasta and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
